title: Crumbly Mediterranean Date Crumble
description: An earthy and crumbly Mediterranean date crumble dish perfect for an indulgent yet low-calorie-friendly date night, featuring whole wheat elements and suitable for those on a watchful eye on their calorie intake.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a small baking dish.
In a large bowl, mix whole-wheat flour and almond meal until well combined. Add dates, butter, brown sugar, vanilla extract, and eggs; stir until the mixture is crumbly but still cohesive.
Pour the mixture into the prepared baking dish and press down firmly with your fingers or back of a spoon to make sure it's evenly distributed.
Place the baking dish on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and set.
Optional: For a more decadent dessert, drizzle some honey over the crumble just before serving.
